🖨 LRN Man DVD Label — Print Instructions

  • Print on Avery 5692, 8692, 8942 or compatible CD/DVD label sheets (2 per page).
  • Or print on plain paper and use a glue stick / CD label applicator.
  • Set printer to Actual Size / 100% — do NOT scale to fit.
  • Each label is exactly 4.72 inches (120mm) in diameter.
  • Center hole cutout: 0.63 inches (16mm).
  • The dashed circle (screen only) is the cut guide — it won't print.
